hooks.command: python -c "import pypdf, pdfplumber, fitz, reportlab, PIL" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"additionalContext": "PDF dependencies not fully installed. Run: pip install pypdf pdfplumber PyMuPDF reportlab Pillow"}'

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qi '\.pdf$'; then echo 'PDF file modified: checking integrity...'; python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/pdf/scripts/pdf_validate.py" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
